text.title: Spinning a Globe and Flying to Watch Football Where it Lands!
text.u: this is a globe a spare document in the
earth and all of the countries in it and
this is a pin something which is going
to dictate where in Europe we end up
watching the football the rules of this
are very simple I spin the globe and
stop it using the pin wherever I hit in
Europe we have to go and watch the game
closest to it Reverend Europe wherever
the level if I miss Europe I hit Russia
or Ukraine I will simply respend once I
have a destination I'll book the flights
and we'll head to that City experience
what it has to offer and take in a
football match too ten thousand likes
and we'll do a worldwide edition of this
just like we did with the dart let's do
this globe pin
let's do this bloody spin us so rapper
it's a rapper what I'm gonna do is I'm
gonna spin it like that and I'm gonna go
bad and wherever that's oh hang on a
minute are we in Europe there it's
Russia we never we can't do Russia all
right I just want to prove to you like
and how we're going to prove where it
was I'm gonna put that in there I'm
excited we can we can end up anywhere in
Europe at any level any tier you know
how this work for now it's very it's
basically data and that but I look
differently
Canada the Pacific Ocean Russia is done
it again Atlantic Ocean

somewhere we've got somewhere get that
in there to prove you're not a cheat and
not a liar Alice yes we have a location
I'm into books and flights come on here
we are then Gatwick Airport doing with

Slovakia kashitsa stumbling into Randy
karaoke bar

you hate you do hate it I'm nothing like
you mate
oh
you can't stop you have to stop dead
walking every time I do no idea I just
start it's not used
this thing is in this challenge we can
be on any of these departures I will
tell you is we've been delayed already
so start as you mean to go on
but we like to drink with Lewis because

he gets it down in four three two
unenthusiastic

flight's been delayed by another hour
we've been delayed by three hours until
here we are from insert country name
let's just say the person in front of us
on the plane was here for a different
reason to us um and you'll figure out
what the reason was when you see where
we are
who's got small thumbs and forgot to
turn his mic on this guy right the mic
wasn't working you know it's well done
Ellis uh this was the point where I
revealed where we actually hit on the
destination as you can see from me
trying to show we hit Prague here's
proof yes as you can see the pin hit
Prague in the Czech Republic and the
closest game to the point of Prague hit
was in the Czech second division to
watch Duke of Prague against your lava
so let's get in and amongst it and
experience Prague anyway on the note of
getting last minute flights to Prague
and getting the last minute hotel to
Prague this was all made possible thanks
to our incredible sponsor for this video
Memento so those of you that don't know
Memento is an app that allows sports
fans to track all the live games they've
been to in a digital scrapbook on their
phone they can track them all it's easy
it's simple and it's a great way to
document the games you've been to and
also share them with friends and other
followers as well also if you couldn't
already tell they're sponsoring this
episode of away days and a load more
throughout the season as well and also
the app is currently only in beta mode
so you can only access it if you have a
special access code which we have thanks
to them sponsoring this video if you
sign up using the link at the top of the
description and put the code in away
days you'll be able to join in and
document every game you go to whether
you went to a League 2 game this weekend
a Premier League game a game in France
German you know I mean you can document
any sports game if you went to a
baseball game so you have to Seattle
Mariners and you can also see my profile
on the screen as well you can see I'm
slowly but surely filling out the games
I've been to and as more leagues get
added as the app expands I'll be able to
fill out even more games I've been to
hopefully dating all the way back to
when I start the channel in 2014. and
also later in this video I'm going to
show you how to make a customized
Memento so you can add your own image to
a momentum on the app to make it even
more customizable even more personal
right let's enjoy Prague bye Ellis
I don't think anyone here is here to
watch Czech second division football but
we are so that's what it matters the guy
in front of us was there to
I thought I can't even say it on camera
I can't disgusting man Paradise so I

did know as well when we got this was

so what we're going to do tonight is

who are more manly than me when they do

walk past this Tower and Lewis has gone
that is a nice Tower to be fair
